name: comp-jco-vet-clinic-sqlite
description: The vet-clinic app with a durable SQLite-backed KV store — same components, persistent across restarts

scripts.prep: cd ../jco-vet-clinic && npm install && npm run transpile
scripts.start: npm run prep && VET_KV_BACKEND=sqlite VET_KV_BACKEND_MODULE="$PWD/kv-backend.js" PORT=${PORT:-3001} tsx ../jco-vet-clinic/src/server.ts
scripts.test: npm run prep && VET_KV_BACKEND=sqlite VET_KV_BACKEND_MODULE="$PWD/kv-backend.js" VET_SQLITE_PATH="$PWD/.test.sqlite" tsx --test test/persist.test.ts
